subcodes.first_line: The Book beareth witness that there is none other God but Me, the Almighty, the All-Wise. The heavens have testified that there is none other God but He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الکتاب انه لا اله الا انا العزیز الحکیم قد شهدت السماء انه لا اله الا
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @Manifestation of God as sun, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine attributes are within all things; every atom
